item.title: Follow these essential skincare steps before your makeup routine!
item.description: Creating a smooth, professional canvas for your makeup doesn't have to be a mystery. In this tutorial, I reveal the specific steps I take to hydrate, protect, and prime my skin for a long-lasting look. You will see exactly how I prep my under-eye area to prevent concealer from creasing. Let's get that healthy, dewy glow together!

media:content.media:title: Follow these essential skincare steps before your makeup routine!
media:content.media:description: Creating a smooth, professional canvas for your makeup doesn't have to be a mystery. In this tutorial, I reveal the specific steps I take to hydrate, protect, and prime my skin for a long-lasting look. You will see exactly how I prep my under-eye area to prevent concealer from creasing. Let's get that healthy, dewy glow together!

item.title: Easy Neutral Makeup!
item.description: A neutral color palette is perfect for creating a clean, professional aesthetic. This tutorial demonstrates how to use earth tones and subtle blending to enhance your natural features for a versatile, everyday style.

media:content.media:title: Easy Neutral Makeup!
media:content.media:description: A neutral color palette is perfect for creating a clean, professional aesthetic. This tutorial demonstrates how to use earth tones and subtle blending to enhance your natural features for a versatile, everyday style.

item.title: How To Look Sultry With Hooded Lids!
item.description: Enhance hooded eyes with professional techniques designed to add depth and lift. This tutorial focuses on strategic shadow placement and blending to create a sultry, defined look that ensures your makeup remains visible and striking.

media:content.media:title: How To Look Sultry With Hooded Lids!
media:content.media:description: Enhance hooded eyes with professional techniques designed to add depth and lift. This tutorial focuses on strategic shadow placement and blending to create a sultry, defined look that ensures your makeup remains visible and striking.

item.title: How to: Smokey Eye
item.description: Learn the essential techniques for creating a perfectly blended smoky eye. This tutorial breaks down shadow placement and graduation to help you achieve a professional, sultry look that works for any occasion.

media:content.media:title: How to: Smokey Eye
media:content.media:description: Learn the essential techniques for creating a perfectly blended smoky eye. This tutorial breaks down shadow placement and graduation to help you achieve a professional, sultry look that works for any occasion.
